responses:
theorem P2_implies_P1 {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {A : Set X} :
    Topology.P2 A → Topology.P1 A := by
  intro h
  have h' : interior (closure (interior A)) ⊆ closure (interior A) := by
    simpa using interior_subset (closure (interior A))
  exact subset_trans h h'

theorem P2_implies_P1 {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {A : Set X} :
    Topology.P2 (A := A) → Topology.P1 (A := A) :=
by
  intro hP2
  dsimp [Topology.P2, Topology.P1] at hP2 ⊢
  intro x hxA
  exact interior_subset (hP2 hxA)
